follow_ups.title: Fix precision loss in List[Int] tensor constructor
follow_ups.body: src/projectodyssey/tensor/any_tensor.mojo:376 writes Float64 values into an Int64-typed tensor via `self._set_float64(i, Float64(data[i]))`. This loses precision for large integers that exceed Float64's mantissa range (>2^53). Should use `self._set_int64(i, Int64(data[i]))` instead. Discovered during #5157 refactor but left out of scope per plan Decision 7.

rejected.title: Add comprehensive tests for all 7 constructor paths
rejected.reason: Test coverage for code outside what was touched; existing tests cover the changed constructors and verify they still work post-refactor.

rejected.title: Extract MAX_TENSOR_BYTES constant to a shared module
rejected.reason: Feature expansion / nice-to-have refactor; not a defect in the code just written. Not driven by a concrete functional gap.
